title: Minimalist Floating Bedside Shelf
description: This sturdy bedside shelf clamps directly onto your bed frame, providing space for a phone, water glass, and book without needing a bulky floor nightstand. Perfect for tight rental bedrooms.

title: Warm Glow LED Pleated Table Lamp
description: Add a touch of vintage charm to your bedroom. This usb-powered pleated fabric lamp throws a warm, ambient light that is perfect for late night reading and cozy vibes.

title: Under-Bed Fabric Storage Bags
description: Maximize your closet space. These breathable fabric storage containers fit snugly under the bed, keeping off-season bedding and clothing dust-free, organized, and easily visible.

title: Tufted Velvet Lumbar Throw Pillow
description: Elevate your bedding styling instantly with this long velvet bolster throw pillow. Features a rich, tactile finish and a hidden zip for easy washing. Instant boho chic look.
